name: llm-wiki
description: Generate a navigable, version-controlled multi-page Markdown wiki from a codebase, engineered for on-demand retrieval as Claude's context (agent memory) while staying human-readable. Two-pass outline-then-fill generation across a parallel agent swarm; consumes a code-atlas index as ground truth when present, else self-scans. Pure static Markdown (no embeddings), Mermaid diagrams, per-page source provenance, and git-blob hash-diff staleness detection. A SessionStart hook loads the wiki index at session start.
